name: Kanade Maki
description:
**Height:** 178 cm

The Vice President of the Student Council at Miyabigaoka High.  ~!He and Igarashi attempt to buy out Café Latte and change it into a butler café. Misaki, Usui, and the Café Latte staff are able to prevent him from realizing his plans through a competition.!~    (Source: Wikipedia)
